title: [MTR4] Tobu 70000 Series | 東武70000系
description: Tobu 70000 Series for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
The Tobu 70000 series is an electric multiple unit (EMU) commuter train operated by private operator Tobu Railway on the Tobu Skytree Line with through running to the Tokyo Metro Hibiya Line. Introduced in 2017, it shares its general design with the Tokyo Metro 13000 series which it operates alongside. A variant of this train, the 70090 series, is equipped with rotating seats and operates on reserved seat services, called TH Liner.

This resource pack adds the Tobu 70000 series to the Minecraft Transit Railway mod with custom model and textures.

There are four types of cars for this train and you may configure them as you wish.

- Cab forwards
- Trailer
- Pantograph trailer
- Cab backwards
